info.title: AnimeVault API
info.description: OpenAPI specification for the AnimeVault backend

get.summary: Returns available filter values for anime discovery

post.summary: Registers a new user and authenticates via session

message.example: Too many login attempts. Please try again later.

get.summary: Returns the public landing page payload for the frontend home
Lists anime with pagination, filters and sorting

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Searches by anime ID or title (romaji, english, native)

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filters by one or more status codes. Use comma-separated values.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Filters by one or more format codes. Use comma-separated values.

parameters.name: season
parameters.description: Filters by one or more season codes. Use comma-separated values.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Filters by one or more source codes. Use comma-separated values.

parameters.name: genres
parameters.description: Filters by one or more genres. Use comma-separated values.

get.summary: Lists manga with pagination, filters and sorting

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Searches by manga ID or title (romaji, english, native)

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filters by one or more status codes. Use comma-separated values.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Filters by one or more format codes. Use comma-separated values.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Filters by one or more source codes. Use comma-separated values.

parameters.name: genres
parameters.description: Filters by one or more genres. Use comma-separated values.

get.summary: Gets available filters for the manga catalog
Checks that the API is reachable
Gets a single anime with its related metadata
Gets a single manga with its related metadata
Lists the authenticated user favorite anime
Lists another user favorite anime when their profile is public

put.summary: Adds an anime to the authenticated user favorites

delete.summary: Removes an anime from the authenticated user favorites

get.summary: Lists the authenticated user anime library
Lists another user anime library when their profile is public

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filters by one or more library statuses. Use comma-separated values.

get.summary: Gets the authenticated user state for a specific anime

put.summary: Creates or updates a library entry for the authenticated user

delete.summary: Deletes a library entry for the authenticated user

post.summary: Marks a single authenticated user notification as read
Marks all authenticated user notifications as read

put.summary: Updates the authenticated user profile and preferences

get.summary: Gets a public user profile when that profile is public

sanctumBearerAuth.description: Bearer token returned by the Sanctum login or register endpoints

tags.name: User Library
tags.description: Authenticated user anime tracking and favorites

tags.name: User Profile
tags.description: Authenticated and public user profile endpoints
